name: yueduqi
description: 基于 Legado 原理的简化版多书源小说阅读器

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
